title: Klekket
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''klekket''' was a period of two months among the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

{{Stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The period of time between the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]] and [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] was described as seven weeks. This may have been the actual length of a klekket, though it may have also been a coincidence.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
